title: Mini Bao Buddies, Kawaii Squeeze Toys with Cute Facial Expressions, Assorted Colors, 4 Pack Set, Stress Relief Squishy Collection
features: ADORABLE DESIGN: Set of 4 mini squishy toys featuring cute kawaii-style faces, perfect for collectors and stress relief
SQUEEZE TOY SET: Soft and squeezable bao-shaped stress toys in assorted pastel colours including yellow, orange, green, and white
COMPACT SIZE: Mini collectible toys sized perfectly for portable play and display, ideal for desks, shelves, or backpacks
STRESS RELIEF: Satisfyingly squishable texture provides a calming sensory experience for children and adults alike
COLLECTIBLE SERIES: Part of the Bao Buddies line, each with unique facial expressions and personality
description: Product description Introducing Mini Bao Buddies, the adorably squishy companions that bring joy to any collection! This delightful 4-pack features an assortment of kawaii-style bao characters, each with its own charming facial expression. These soft, squeezable toys are perfectly sized for little hands and make excellent stress-relief accessories or desk companions. The set includes four different pastel-coloured bao dumplings, featuring cute hand-drawn faces that range from sweet smiles to playful winks. Each Mini Bao Buddy maintains its shape after squishing, making them perfect for repetitive squeezing and stress relief. They're wonderful as collectibles, party favours, or small gifts for anyone who loves cute Japanese-inspired designs. These pocket-sized pals are ideal for brightening up any space, whether it's your desk, shelf, or school bag. Add these charming Mini Bao Buddies to your collection and experience the simple joy of having these sweet-faced dumplings as your daily companions! Safety Warning Recommended For Ages 15+. This Collectable Product Is Not A Toy And Has The Possibility Of Containing Small Parts.
